title: Kelp Animation Remover
body:
![Screen](https://i.imgur.com/D19KwcE.png)

Many players complain that the animated kelp and sea grass badly reduce FPS in the game. Well, maybe it is, maybe not ¯\\_(ツ)_/¯. In any case, this resource pack removes this animations.

By the way, the underwater world looks great even without those animated textures. Enjoy.

*`The underwater world may have become more static, but certainly not lifeless. While everything around come to a standstill, it's only until a fish swims and catching your gaze.`*
